strategy_reasoning: The update mix is eclectic (OCR vs Nail Art), so using the different characters allows us to showcase 'serious' and 'fun' updates side-by-side without tonal whiplash. The cozy pixel art unifies these disparate tools into a single 'garden' of creation.
visual_style: Chunky 8-bit sprites, warm CRT glow, soft pastel gradients with mandatory lime green accents. Stardew Valley meets a hacker den.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a digital fashion atelier. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head is holding a pixelated dress design, screen eyes glowing with excitement. The tiny yellow bee mascot (Polly) hovers nearby wearing a tiny artist beret, adjusting a lime green (#ecf874) sash on a mannequin. Soft pastel gradient background (mint to peach). Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'PIXEL STYLE'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
images.description: Highlighting the visual/creative tools (Fashion, Nails, Pixoo64) with the Robot and Polly.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a retro server garden. The round tan mochi-ball creature (Nomnom) is happily eating a stack of pixelated documents labeled 'OCR', saying 'NOMNOM' in a speech bubble. The bee mascot (Polly) sits on a large lime green (#ecf874) enter key, reading a manual labeled 'GO'. Soft lavender and cream background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic. Cozy pixel art, chunky sprites, nostalgic vibes.
images.description: Focusing on the technical updates (OCR, Go Client, LangChain) with Nomnom consuming data.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a tabletop gaming session in a garden shed. The bee mascot (Polly) is wearing a tiny wizard hat, rolling a 20-sided pixel die on a dungeon map. A retro smartphone displaying an app rests against a glowing lime green (#ecf874) potion bottle. Vines and code-plants grow in the background. Soft pastel lighting. Text in pixel font: 'LVL UP'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, warm atmosphere.
images.description: Celebrating the gaming/community apps (D&D, Android App) and the general 'level up' of 35 PRs.

caption:
35 PRs merged this week. The ecosystem is getting weird in the best way.

We got serious infra stuff: LangChain integration, a new Go client, and document OCR.
We got niche creative stuff: A fashion bulk creator, AI nail art generator, and pixel art for Pixoo64 frames.
We even got a D&D dungeon master tool.

From enterprise docs to digital manicures, it’s all just HTTP calls in the end.

Build something fun. Link in bio.
alt_text: Pixel art carousel: 1. Robot and bee in a fashion atelier designing clothes. 2. Round creature eating documents while bee reads code. 3. Bee playing D&D in a garden shed.
